# catalystcenter_wireless_rrm_fra_configuration (Resource)

This resource manages a Wireless RRM Flexible Radio Assignment (FRA) Configuration feature template. FRA feature templates define global/controller-level FRA settings per radio band pair and can be attached to wireless network profiles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_wireless_rrm_fra_configuration" "example" {
  design_name     = "Test"
  radio_band      = "2_4GHZ_5GHZ"
  fra_freeze      = true
  fra_status      = true
  fra_interval    = 3
  fra_sensitivity = "Medium"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `design_name` (String) The name of the RRM FRA feature template. Forbidden characters are `% & < > [ ] ' /`.
- `radio_band` (String) Radio band pair the FRA configuration applies to. `5GHZ_6GHZ` is supported only on IOS-XE Wireless Controllers running 17.9.1 and above.
  - Choices: `2_4GHZ_5GHZ`, `5GHZ_6GHZ`

### Optional

- `fra_freeze` (Boolean) Enable Flexible Radio Assignment freeze. Supported on IOS-XE Wireless Controllers running version >= 17.6 for `2_4GHZ_5GHZ` and version >= 17.9 for `5GHZ_6GHZ`.
- `fra_interval` (Number) Flexible Radio Assignment interval in hours (1-24).
  - Range: `1`-`24`
- `fra_sensitivity` (String) Flexible Radio Assignment sensitivity. Values `Higher`, `Even Higher`, and `Super High` are supported only on IOS-XE Wireless Controllers running 17.5 and above and only for the `2_4GHZ_5GHZ` radio band.
  - Choices: `Low`, `Medium`, `High`, `Higher`, `Even Higher`, `Super High`
- `fra_status` (Boolean) Enable Flexible Radio Assignment.
- `unlocked_attributes` (List of String) Feature attributes unlocked in the design that can be changed at device provision time. Only attributes defined under `featureAttributes` are allowed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_wireless_rrm_fra_configuration.example "<id>"
```
